resources.string: Already have an account? Sign In
Don't have an account? Sign Up
Cannot reach server. Please check your connection.
Enter the code from the email to verify your address.
Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
Network error. Please check your connection.
No account found with this email
Create a new password for your account.
Password reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Tell us a bit about yourself
Sign up to save your progress and access all features.
Your private, judgment-free space for sexual health.
We'll ask for this whenever you open the app.
Please re-enter your PIN to confirm.
PINs do not match. Please try again.
Authenticate to access your health data
In the last 3 months, how many sexual partners have you had?
How often do you use protection (condoms/PrEP)?
Did you know? PrEP is over 99% effective at preventing HIV when taken daily.
View all your lab results and testing history
• HIV testing: Every 3-6 months for sexually active individuals\n• STI screening: Every 3-6 months or as recommended\n• Hepatitis: Annually or as recommended by your provider
All results are reviewed by a board-certified physician. You will be notified of any critical findings.
No slots left on this day
Notify me if a slot opens
How much do you currently have?
Add the core medication details first. You can set up stock and schedule in the next steps.
Review the summary, then update details or manage linked schedules below.
Track supply like 30 tablets, 20 capsules, or 100 mL.
Save now, then optionally add a schedule in the next step.
Save now, or jump straight into schedule setup after saving.
Move to archive to hide from active list
Add a medication to start tracking doses and reminders.
Schedule saved, but notifications are disabled in system settings.
Please answer the following questions to assess your risk.
Have you had unprotected sex in the last 3 months?
Have you shared needles or injection equipment?
Note: This is a preliminary self-assessment and does not replace professional medical advice.
Based on your answers, you may be at higher risk for HIV. We recommend consulting a healthcare provider for further testing.
Based on your answers, your risk appears to be low. However, regular screening is always recommended for sexual health.
Create reminder schedules like Morning meds or Bedtime meds.
Schedule saved, but notifications are disabled in system settings.
End date must be on or after the start date.
Nothing scheduled in the next 7 days.
What would you like to add?
Track your visit or lab work
No scheduled doses for this day.
This only changes the selected dose. Future doses will stay on their usual schedule.
%1$s is close to a scheduled dose. Match it or keep it as an extra log.
No mood entries for this day.
Shipped in a plain, unbranded box.
Never run out of your prevention.
No articles match this filter yet.
We couldn't load education content right now.
No badges yet. Finish a quiz to start earning them.
Great work! You have a strong understanding of %1$s. Continue to stay informed about your sexual health.
You're on the right track! Review the explanations for questions you missed to strengthen your knowledge.
Learning is a journey! Take time to review the material and retake the quiz to improve your understanding.
Sign in to track lab results, book screenings, and more
View your lab results history and monitor your health over time
Book appointments and receive reminders for regular testing
Your health data is encrypted and protected with biometric security
Send discreet SMS alerts via TellYourPartner.org
Your privacy matters to us. Review our terms of service and privacy policy to understand how we protect your data and your rights as a user.

Terms of Service

By using Vita, you agree to the following terms:

1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing and using this application, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

2. Health Information Disclaimer
This app provides health information for educational purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

3. User Responsibilities
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

4. Data Accuracy
While we strive to keep health information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of any information provided.

5. Service Modifications
We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice.

6. Limitation of Liability
In no event shall Vita be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service.

Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

1. Information We Collect
We collect information you provide directly, including: name, email address, health screening results, and appointment history.

2. How We Use Your Information
We use your information to: provide health services, send appointment reminders, improve our services, and communicate with you about your health.

3. Data Security
We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits to protect your personal and health information.

4. Data Retention
We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.

5. Your Rights
You have the right to: access your data, correct inaccurate data, request deletion, and opt-out of marketing communications.

6. Third-Party Services
We may use third-party services that collect anonymous usage data to help us improve the app. These services have their own privacy policies.

7. Children's Privacy
This app is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

8. Contact Us
If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@vitahealth.app
If you have any questions about our terms or privacy policy, please contact our support team at legal@vitahealth.app
Are you sure you want to logout?
You will need to sign in again to access your account.
If you're experiencing a medical emergency, please call 911 or visit your nearest emergency room immediately.
Desaturate the app so status differences are easier to perceive without relying on colour
Get notified 24 hours before scheduled appointments
Get notified when lab results are available
Remind me to schedule screenings every 3 months
Weekly tips and articles about sexual health
Special offers on protection and testing kits
When enabled, notifications will not show specific details about appointments or test results. You'll receive a generic reminder to check the app.
Grayscale mode is saved on this device and applies across the calendar, charts, and the rest of the app interface.
Adjust visual accommodations so information remains clear without depending on colour alone.
Desaturate the app so status differences are easier to perceive without relying on colour
Grayscale mode is saved on this device and applies across the calendar, charts, and the rest of the app interface.
Use fingerprint or face recognition to secure your data
Encrypt all health records stored on device
Hide app contents when the app is not in the foreground
Share anonymous health trends to help public health research
Allow anonymized data to be used in medical studies
Require a PIN to open the app
Verify your current PIN to continue.
Verify your PIN to disable PIN protection.
All your health data is encrypted and stored securely. We will never share your personal information without your explicit consent.
